threats.title: New Gaslight macOS Malware Uses Prompt Injection to Disrupt AI-Assisted Analysis
threats.summary: A previously undocumented Rust-based macOS implant and information stealer has been found to embed a prompt injection payload designed to trick a malware analyst's artificial intelligence (AI) tools and trick it into aborting or refusing an analysis of the artifact. threats.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Zero-Day CVE-2026-20245 Exploited to Gain Root Access
threats.summary: An unknown threat actor exploited a recently disclosed high-severity security flaw impacting Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN as a zero-day at least two months before it was publicly disclosed, according to new findings from Google-owned Mandiant.
